title: Interaction Resources, Typed Parts, Conversation State, and Retention · Runtime Lens: Per Turn Configuration
summary: The agent concatenates messages into text, loses function-call identity, assumes previous_interaction_id preserves tools and system instruction, and cannot explain provider retention. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the per turn configuration increment in typed Gemini interaction and state ledger. Learners progress through predictio…
objectives: Re-declare interaction-scoped tools, system instruction, and generation configuration on every turn that needs them.
Use previous_interaction_id deliberately, distinguish server-side history from stateless replay, and preserve local audit evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-per-turn-configuration — Re-declare interaction-scoped tools, system instruction, and generation configuration on every turn that needs them.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-interaction-state-parts-2
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-interaction-state-parts-2.
# Case 7417: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def worked_agentpy_interaction_state_parts_2(interactions: int = 12, correlated_interactions: int = 12, part_types: int = 5, redeclared_configs: int = 12, ambiguous_state_links: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "authorityworked2",
        "interaction7417",
        "tool2dekrow",
        "stateworked27417",
        "evaluation7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if interactions < 1 or correlated_interactions < 0:
        return False, correlated_interactions, "interaction-count"
    if correlated_interactions != interactions:
        return False, correlated_interactions, "interaction-correlation"
    if part_types < 3 or redeclared_configs != interactions:
        return False, part_types, "part-or-config-gap"
    if ambiguous_state_links > 0:
        return False, ambiguous_state_links, "state-ambiguity"
    assert correlated_interactions == interactions and ambiguous_state_links == 0
    return True, correlated_interactions, "typed-interaction-state"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-per-turn-configuration-k1x4zz
# Competency: agentpy-per-turn-configuration.

        "authorityk1x4zz",
        "interaction2957",
        "toolzz4x1k",
        "statek1x4zz2957",
        "evaluation2957k1x4zz",
        "recoveryzz4x1k2957",

    assert len(set(evidence_axes_k1x4zz)) == 6

    assert correlated_interactions == interactions and ambiguous_state_links == 0

At Safe AI agents and Python Repair the Per Turn Configuration defect · Theory Per Turn Configuration, trace this concrete input and predict model request, interaction step, schema validation, tool choice, authorization, approval, result, state transition, memory, evaluation, trace, rejection, stop, rollback, recovery, and controlled-provider evidence before reviewing it: A theory agent engineering team handles case 4546 during an accessible public-service intake assistant. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile interaction resources, typed parts, previous identifiers, per-turn configuration, state choice, and retention evidence; every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy; then inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

options.text: For repair the per turn configuration defect, run one convenient fluent model response, omit stakeholder risk, revision, model and API identity, interaction and call correlation, tool schema and authority, state and resource budgets, approval, changed fixtures, injection, privacy, accessibility, evaluation, recovery, and controlled provider transfer, then accept plausible text as agent proof. This does not satisfy Per Turn Configuration for typed Gemini interaction and state ledger.
Reconstruct the conditions for Per Turn Configuration, gather a counterexample, repair the artifact, and add a regression case.

Keep the Per Turn Configuration artifact unchanged and rewrite its explanation so the unsupported output appears intentional. That claim fails the repair the per turn configuration defect evidence boundary for Per Turn Configuration.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Defend the Per Turn Configuration model · Theory Per Turn Configuration
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Per Turn Configuration: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory agent engineering team handles case 2927 during a controlled support-operations rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile interaction resources, typed parts, previous identifiers, per-turn configuration, state choice, and retention evidence; every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy; then replace trusted context with untrusted indirect instructions and preserve data-versus-instruction boundaries. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Re-declare interaction-scoped tools, system instruction, and generation configuration on every turn that needs them.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Re-declare interaction-scoped tools, system instruction, and generation configuration on every turn that needs them.
